_comment: Depth presets for the fixture E2E dispatch (.github/workflows/fixture-e2e-dispatch.yml). Deliberately NOT a per-fixture enumeration: fixtures are discovered from <fixture-root>/repos at run time, so adding a fixture to matthiasrohr/appsec-advisor-fixtures needs no edit here and none in the workflow. Only add an 'overrides' entry when one fixture needs a different budget than its depth default. Fields map 1:1 onto flags the drivers accept - scripts/e2e_fixture.sh and scripts/e2e_cross_repo_fixture.sh both take --depth and --max-duration. Do not add model knobs; neither driver forwards them.

overrides._comment: Optional per-fixture budget overrides, keyed by fixture directory name, e.g. "cross-repo-threat-fixture": { "standard": { "max_duration_sec": 7200 } }
